name: oracle-ai-data-platform-workbench-databricks-migrator
description: Drive the Oracle AI Data Platform (AIDP) Databricks Migration Toolkit in natural language. Self-contained for Codex: the OpenAI-based Python migration engine ships bundled under engine/ and is staged by the SessionStart hook to ~/.aidp-migrator/engine. Teaches Codex how to plan and execute an automated end-to-end migration of Databricks (Unity Catalog / HMS) notebooks, jobs, schedules, and catalog DDL onto AIDP - Pass-1 dependency resolution plus Pass-2 cell-by-cell execute/verify/fix on a live AIDP cluster using an OpenAI model with tool use. Covers job_migrate.py orchestration, catalog migration, workflow DAG manifest building, fixup_cell rewind, pre-migration data-availability checks, write-redirect sandbox schema, and the acceptance-contract pattern for batch/streaming convergence.

interface.shortDescription: Self-contained Databricks to Oracle AIDP migrations from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Plan and execute automated Databricks to Oracle AIDP migrations from Codex. The plugin bundles the OpenAI-based Python engine and stages it to ~/.aidp-migrator/engine on SessionStart, so no separate migrator clone is required. Pass-1 rewrites Databricks APIs in dependency notebooks; Pass-2 executes each task cell-by-cell on a live AIDP cluster with 4-way verify (exception / stderr / Spark logs / model eval) and up to 10 fix attempts per cell. Handles Unity Catalog / HMS DDL via deterministic rewrite rules, workflow DAG manifest building, write-redirect sandbox schema for data safety, resume-from-cache, and acceptance contracts for streaming or batch convergence.
defaultPrompt: Use aidp-migrator-overview to pick the right skill for migrating a Databricks job, Unity Catalog DDL, a data check, or a prior run resume.
Use aidp-migrator-bootstrap on first-time setup to confirm ~/.aidp-migrator/engine, Python deps, ~/.oci/config, an ACTIVE AIDP cluster, OPENAI_API_KEY, and the env-coords scaffold.
Use migrate-job-flow for the full guided end-to-end migration with checkpoints between phases.
